backend/main.mo: Defines an empty Motoko actor with no methods or state.
feature_evidence.json: Documents evidence for frontend theme features ensuring a red background and readable foreground text across light and dark modes, referencing index.css.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Provides brief human-written summaries of key frontend source files and their roles in the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets up the root div and loads the React application module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the LandingPage component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity authentication and initializes access control.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context and provider, handling login, logout, and identity state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder indicating no backend queries are required.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining a consistent red background theme with high-contrast foreground colors for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application bootstrap that renders the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Static landing page layout with header, hero text, social links, and footer, styled using the global theme.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL and session-based parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling class-based dark mode, scanning frontend source files, and extending the theme with OKLCH CSS-variable color tokens, radius/shadow tokens, container settings, and accordion animations. Registers typography, container-queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Machine-readable snapshot of the project’s current state and features, including schema/versioning, a high-level project summary, and a detailed list of implemented features spanning the landing page, Tailwind theming, animations, and Internet Identity/ICP actor scaffolding.
